source.note: real seeded app via apps-container + reverse tunnel; deterministic container grade

task.en: Open Cheskepdia, the vacation-stay booking app at http://localhost:3012 (it is already open in Safari and you are logged in). Book the listing 'Classic 1BR in Rittenhouse Square' in Philadelphia for 2 guests, checking in August 10, 2026 and checking out August 14, 2026. Complete the reservation.
